title: VerityReceipt
description: XAP v0.1 — In progress. Placeholder schema for deterministic decision provenance and replay.

decision_type.description: Type of decision captured for replay.

input_state_hash.description: Hash of the decision input state.

decision_trace.description: Reasoning and policy trace used to make the decision.

decision_signature.description: Ed25519 signature over canonical decision payload.
